_notes.purpose: Maps keyword clusters and signal types to consulting offers. Used by the lead radar logic in the collector pipeline to assign recommended_offer and flag lead_radar=true on high-quality BizDeedz signals.
_notes.primary_offer: AI Readiness Audit for Law Firms

offers.name: AI Readiness Audit for Law Firms
offers.description: Structured assessment of a law firm's current processes, tools, and team to identify AI adoption readiness and highest-leverage automation opportunities.
trigger_pain_phrases: no one follows the same process

lead_radar_sheet_schema._note: Scaffold for Lead_Radar Google Sheet tab. Create this tab in V1 Phase 2. The collector will write to it when lead_radar=true.
